title: centaurium quadrifolium subsp. gypsicola
intro: Centaurium quadrifolium subsp. gypsicola, also known as the gypsum centaury, is a subspecies of the Centaurium quadrifolium plant, a perennial herb native to parts of the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurium quadrifolium subsp. gypsicola include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
